document.title: Q2. Clinical Image Test Plan
document.documentType: Pre-Submission / Q-Submission clinical image test plan

sourceSummary.oneLine: Pre-Submission request seeking FDA feedback on a newly established Clinical Image Test Plan for HnX-R1 (K252912).
sourceSummary.officialUse: Used to request formal FDA feedback on whether the clinical image test plan addresses NSE letter concerns about validity and integrity of performance data.
keyPoints: The Pre-Submission asks FDA to provide formal feedback on the Clinical Image Test Plan for HnX-R1 (K252912).
The plan is intended to address deficiencies identified in an NSE letter dated January 6, 2026.
FDA feedback is requested on selected anatomical regions and metadata such as patient demographics and X-ray exposure parameters.
FDA feedback is requested on methodology involving image acquisition by a qualified radiographer and image quality evaluation by a board-certified radiologist.

reviewFlags.reason: Document date is not present in the source text; the January 6, 2026 date refers to the NSE letter, not this document.
